story: Fugitive witch Cecily ducked into a highway hotel, hiding under a red wig. At the bar she met Orlando; upstairs he came out with a gun and her real name. She curved the shot back and burned his body clean. Meanwhile, the bar’s cameras had flagged her face on a watchlist; the desk clerk forwarded the alert. Cecily stepped into the corridor, satchel thumping her ribs.
implausible_knowledge: Meanwhile, the bar’s cameras had flagged her face on a watchlist; the desk clerk forwarded the alert.
question: After stepping into the corridor, what will Cecily most plausibly do next to avoid being caught?
answer_with_knowledge: Slip out a service exit and get out of town immediately, avoiding the lobby and any hotels.
answer_without_knowledge: Go to another nearby hotel and check in under a new name and wig.
